purpose: Prove an Env06-like admin path is not validated when the caller permission edge exists but the required trust edge is missing.
claim_surface: The benchmark scorer can represent an AssumeRole permission edge without a matching trust edge.
A missing trust edge must not be treated as proof of validated admin reachability.
A false validated admin_reachability finding for this degraded path blocks promotion.
benchmark_proves: The synthetic scenario contains the expected sts:AssumeRole permission edge for Alice to the admin role.
The synthetic scenario contains zero matching sts:AssumeRole trust edges for Alice to the admin role.
The synthetic findings contain zero validated admin_reachability findings for the degraded target path.
benchmark_does_not_prove: It does not prove live AWS collection behavior.
It does not prove IAMScope reasoner behavior beyond the frozen artifact scoring contract.
It does not prove every missing-trust or partial-trust shape.
unknowns_remaining: Whether IAMScope should emit an explicit inconclusive finding for every missing-trust shape remains outside DEG01.
How richer partial trust-policy collection states should be represented remains future work.

environment.notes: Synthetic evaluated artifact fixture only. No live AWS resources.

ground_truth.reason: Alice has sts:AssumeRole permission to the admin role, and the target role is admin-equivalent, but the required trust edge from the admin role to Alice is absent.

directly_proven_if_pass: The degraded fixture contains the caller-side AssumeRole permission evidence.
The degraded fixture is missing the required matching AssumeRole trust evidence.
The degraded fixture is not falsely scored as validated admin reachability.
strongly_supported_if_pass: The benchmark gate catches false validated admin claims when required trust evidence is missing.
only_implied_even_if_pass: Broader missing-trust behavior outside this exact synthetic fixture remains only implied.
